taxon.name: Iris hookeri

default_photo.attribution: (c) J. Burke Korol, some rights reserved (CC BY-NC), uploaded by J. Burke Korol

taxon.wikipedia_summary: Iris hookeri, commonly called the beach head iris, is a species of Iris.
